io.papermc.paper.plugin.loader.library

Package
Description
io.papermc.paper.plugin.loader
 
io.papermc.paper.plugin.loader.library
 
io.papermc.paper.plugin.loader.library.impl
 
  • Classes in io.papermc.paper.plugin.loader.library used by io.papermc.paper.plugin.loader
    Class
    Description
    ClassPathLibrary
    The classpath library interface represents libraries that are capable of registering themselves via ClassPathLibrary.register(LibraryStore) on any given LibraryStore.
  • Classes in io.papermc.paper.plugin.loader.library used by io.papermc.paper.plugin.loader.library
    Class
    Description
    LibraryLoadingException
    Indicates that an exception has occured while loading a library.
    LibraryStore
    Represents a storage that stores library jars.
  • Classes in io.papermc.paper.plugin.loader.library used by io.papermc.paper.plugin.loader.library.impl
    Class
    Description
    ClassPathLibrary
    The classpath library interface represents libraries that are capable of registering themselves via ClassPathLibrary.register(LibraryStore) on any given LibraryStore.
    LibraryLoadingException
    Indicates that an exception has occured while loading a library.
    LibraryStore
    Represents a storage that stores library jars.
